channel.title: Duplicated import issue, package.json in package && app root folder
channel.description:
Hi everybody,
My question will be quite simple as I came to the end that I import three.js twice. There are to package.json : the one at the application root, and the one in the "theme package". Which one should I use to import three.js and a bunch of other dependencies ?
Thanks a lot ! Have a very nice day !

item.title: Duplicated import issue, package.json in package && app root folder
item.dc:creator: vil
item.description:
Hi everybody,

My question will be quite simple as I came to the end that I import three.js twice.
There are to package.json : the one at the application root, and the one in the “theme package”.
Which one should I use to import three.js and a bunch of other dependencies ?

Thanks a lot ! Have a very nice day !

Read full topic
item.source: Duplicated import issue, package.json in package && app root folder
